baseline.observed: returned JSON with output_path null and warning: Output path ignored because Markdown export was disabled.

observed_weaknesses: The CLI accepted contradictory output and no-export options.
A requested output path could be silently ignored while the command still exited successfully.

selected_candidate.name: CLI output/no-export conflict rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Make mutually exclusive scan output options fail before scanning.
selected_candidate.success_metric: scan --output ... --no-export exits non-zero; scan --output without --no-export still writes markdown.

safety_controls: The change is limited to promptvault-cli.rs.
The library run_scan warning behavior remains unchanged for API callers.
A valid output export smoke test was rerun.
Temporary /tmp export files were removed after smoke testing.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
